title: NEW Gemini Features Explained — How to Use Google’s Latest AI Upgrade
summary: A YouTube guide demonstrating Gemini 3.5 Flash capabilities across eight real-world workflows including multimodal vision, video analysis with Python, contract analysis with thinking modes, code generation from sketches, voice-to-task conversion, error fixing, OCR for receipts, and Workspace agentic chains. The video claims Flash performance matches Pro tier pricing at a lower cost.
